descriptions.value: This Steam Gamecard can be obtained from the indie sci-fi game, 'The Construct'. Shown on the card is the detailed graphical depiction of the TSD-17/45 command ship, that the player needs to defeat in the game.

This Steam Gamecard can be obtained from the indie sci-fi game, 'The Construct'. Shown on the card is the detailed graphical depiction of the HMDS heavy mining ship, that needs to be defeated in the game.

This Steam Gamecard can be obtained from the indie sci-fi game, 'The Construct'. Shown on the card is the detailed graphical depiction of the TD 75/B mobile command center, that the player gets to control during several periods of the game.
This Steam Gamecard can be obtained from the indie sci-fi game, 'The Construct'. This is the one unique card in the set.

descriptions.value: In the field of biological weapons, there is almost no prospect of detecting a pathogen until it has been used in an attack.
The natural superiority of women is a biological fact, and a socially acknowledged reality.
The chief function of the city is to convert power into form, energy into culture, dead matter into the living symbols of art, biological reproduction into social creativity.
We are embedded in a biological world and related to the organisms around us.
This work made me more and more interested in biological matter, and I decided that I really wanted to work on the X-ray analysis of biological molecules.
A hero. You want to be one of those rare human beings who make history, rather than merely watch it flow around them like water around a rock.
The hero sees values beyond what's possible.
The fame of heroes owes little to the extent of their conquests and all to the success of the tributes paid to them.
Heroism is endurance for one moment more.

The hero is not fed on sweets,
Daily his own heart he eats.
Some day you will be old enough to start reading fairy tales again.

descriptions.value: That was our friendship: equal parts irritation and cooperation.
A good marriage, like any partnership, meant subordinating one's own needs to that of the other's, in the expectation that the other will do the same.
One hand washes the other.
Your technique means nothing if you're not using your talents for the betterment of humanity.
Our future lies not in competition, but in responsible, interdependent cooperation.
